more.title: High Court rules against John Nkomo’s son in fight over vehicles seized for US$62k debt
more.description: BULAWAYO - The High Court of Zimbabwe has dismissed an attempt by Jabulani Nkomo, son of the late Vice-President John Landa Nkomo, to claim ownership of three vehicles attached in execution of a US$62 975 debt owed by Astra Building Centre (Private) Limited, ruling that the matter had already been decided in an earlier case.The post High Court rules against John Nkomo’s son in fight over vehicles seized for US$62k debt appeared first on Nehanda Radio.
